hero.title: Off-Market Listing Turkey
hero.subtitle: Private, off-market real estate in Istanbul, Bodrum & Antalya
hero.description: Concierge service, verified listings, full due diligence. For serious buyers only.

stats.citizenship: Minimum property value for citizenship eligibility

curated.title: Curated Exclusivity
curated.body: Every listing is personally vetted. We carry a small, selective portfolio of properties not available through any public channel - Bosphorus yalilar, Bodrum seafront villas, and Aegean coastal estates.

verified.title: Verified Due Diligence
verified.body: Title deed (tapu) status, DASK insurance, zoning compliance, habitation permits, and mortgage encumbrances are reviewed before any property is presented to you. No surprises after commitment.

concierge.title: Concierge Service
concierge.body: Private airport transfers, chauffeur-guided property tours, introductions to citizenship lawyers, and post-purchase support. We remain your point of contact from first enquiry through to completion.

submit.title: Submit Your Criteria
submit.body: Share your target city, budget range, property type, and whether Turkish citizenship by investment is a consideration. We treat all enquiries as strictly confidential.

match.title: We Match Listings
match.body: Within 48 hours, a consultant presents a curated shortlist from our off-market portfolio. Properties are described fully; addresses are withheld until NDA is signed.

guided.title: Guided Transaction
guided.body: We coordinate the viewing, due diligence, legal review, and negotiation. Our fee is paid by the seller. You pay nothing for the advisory service.

brand.name: Off-Market Listing Turkey
brand.tagline: Your Private Gateway to Turkey's Hidden Real Estate Gems.

footer.legal: © 2026 Off-Market Listing Turkey. All rights reserved. This website does not constitute financial or investment advice. All market data is sourced from publicly available reports and should not be relied upon as a guarantee of future performance. Regulated under applicable Turkish real estate law.

common.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

value.description: Sellers of high-value real estate in Turkey choose discretion. We maintain direct relationships with owners across Istanbul, Bodrum, Antalya, and Alacati.

process.description: We move at your pace, protect your privacy, and focus only on suitable properties.

markets.description: We maintain active seller relationships in key neighborhoods and coastal areas. Listings are never shared publicly.

market.body1: Turkey's residential market posted strong nominal growth in 2024-2025, but real inflation-adjusted returns were weaker in many segments.
market.body2: Foreign buyer transactions rose, citizenship thresholds stayed at $400K, and some coastal luxury segments faced oversupply into 2025-2026.
market.source: Sources: Turkish Statistical Institute (TUIK), GYODER, Central Bank of Turkey. Data as of H1 2025.

panelNotes.rental: Short-let yields higher, with regulatory risk

magnet.title: Turkey Real Estate Due Diligence Checklist
magnet.subtitle: 12-point verification guide for foreign buyers - tapu, DASK, zoning, permits, and more. PDF delivered instantly.

contact.formSubtitle: We typically respond within one business day with a personalised shortlist.
contact.privacy: Secure: KVKK & GDPR compliant | Data stored securely | Never sold to third parties

assurances.noPublicBody: Every property we present has been kept off the market at the seller's request.
assurances.feeFreeBody: Our commission is paid by the seller. There is no charge to buyers for enquiries, viewings, or advisory services.
